content.headline: Following Up on Your Demo Request
content.body:
Hi [Name],

Thank you for your interest in our platform. I wanted to follow up on your demo request with some relevant insights.

[CLM_034] demonstrates how RAG grounding with citations increases trust in AI-authored drafts.

[CLM_047] shows how persona-aware content outperforms generic templates by addressing specific objections and outcomes.

These capabilities would directly address the challenges you mentioned. When would be a good time to walk through a personalized demo?
